explanation: Novel, Biography, Textbook, and Scroll are all formats or types of works primarily used to contain and convey substantial amounts of written text intended for extensive reading. A Billboard, however, is designed for short, impactful visual advertising.

Zeus, Poseidon, Hades, and Hera are all prominent figures in Greek mythology, specifically the twelve Olympian gods and goddesses. Loki is a major deity in Norse mythology, making him the odd one out.

category: Words Denoting Specific Quantities or Fractions
explanation: QUARTER (1/4), PAIR (2), DOZEN (12), and GROSS (144) are all words that denote specific numerical quantities or fractions. SOLITAIRE refers to a game played by one person, not a unit of measurement or count of items.
